name: Count In
description: Drummer counting the band in with stick clicks

simple: drummer counting the band in with confident stick clicks
standard: drummer counting the band in with confident stick clicks
jazz trio getting the tempo with four click count
bandleader snapping fingers to set the groove
detailed: drummer counting the band in with confident stick clicks
jazz trio getting the tempo with four click count
bandleader snapping fingers to set the groove
hi-hat clicking steady pulse before the downbeat
bass player thumping root note to anchor the key

instruments: wire brushes swirling on snare head
